title: Enhanced Beacons [Quality Version]
description: A visual Datapack for the Beacons to make them more interesting. [NEW Beacon Visuals & Player Buff Visuals]
body:
# Enhanced Beacons - 🟢**Quality Version**
(smooth animations, up to 50 Beacons.) **Enhanced Beacons** is a lightweight **visual datapack** designed to improve the lame beacons and their effects. It assigns unique visual/particle effects to the player corresponding to the specific buff currently active. The Beam has a new Helix Spiral around it, which can change color with glass! **This pack is purely cosmetic and does not alter gameplay mechanics or stats.** ## Features
BEACON VISUALS - **Helix Spiral💫:** Generates a **Helix Spiral around the Beam**. **Color changes** based on the glass block above the Beacon! - **Ambient Particles:** Enchantment effect made with particles, to make it seem like the Beacon is "**charging**". ![Helix Beam](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/4LySR74R/images/af484e55b12270e1a3d42332cdb6cd61387e07af.gif)
_(Has a backed-in Fallback method. Even if a Beacon is spawned or didn't register, it will after/every 10sec.)_
PLAYER VISUALS - **Speed:** Generates speed trails behind the player while sprinting. - **Jump Boost:** Emits a cloud effect beneath the player when jumping. - **Haste:** Adds subtle sparking effect. - **Resistance:** Displays a defensive aura effect (Players glow for 1sec.). - **Strength:** Emits intensity particles around the player. Hitting a target will show visual impact. - **Regeneration:** Adds passive healing indicators in form of Hearts :)

## Examples: ![Sprint Trail](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/4LySR74R/images/6e5113fbbc101b34b0a9b930fa8191dfb3918e93.png) ![Jump Cloud](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/4LySR74R/images/d85668d28b495a665179cc4da925f311a8d33421.png)

## ⚠️READ ME
### There are 2 Versions of this Datapack. -🟢Quality: Up to 50 Beacons simultaneously. Smooth animations based on 1 Tick. More for small SMP's. ### and -🔴[Performance (Click Here)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/enhanced-beacons-performance-version): Up to 100 Beacons simultaneously. Less Smooth animations based on 2 Ticks. More for medium sized SMP's.
## Compatibility **Works on Servers!✅** Enhanced Beacons is developed for Minecraft **1.21.11**. **Join the [Discord](https://discord.gg/rXnr7XHRg8) server for Bug reports or feature suggestions :)**
